final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: needs a layered typography aesthetic with artistic lettering — exact stylistic execution and font choices are yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include layered/stacked typography arrangement, must include products or main subjects partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements
Subject: must include promotional products or main visual subjects as focal elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic lettering, must include stacked/layered typography, must maintain visual complexity without appearing cluttered, must have products or subjects partially blocking some text
Avoid: must avoid visual clutter despite complexity
